Tracked historically in .to-issues/ + docs/adr/0001-0013, not in this file.

features.name: Nexus Terminal-Stream Redesign
features.description: First concrete feat-002 item from pitch feedback: retire the left-side thinking-node chain in Nexus (camera flying wildly, nodes too small as they multiply); replace with a terminal-style streaming log (Claude Code / hermes style: small mono type, per-speaker colors, manifest lines bold/colored as clickable anchors). Right-side Manifest cards stay on the pan/zoom board with a calmer camera. Design via grill: Q1-Q3 settled, Q4-Q10 pending Danny review (see session-handoff.md). Outcome: ADR-0014 superseding ADR-0004 radial canvas + ADR-0012 rev5/6 Nexus parts.
features.evidence: 2026-06-12 closed. ADR-0014 written (supersedes ADR-0004 radial expression + ADR-0012 rev5/6 Nexus parts). Implementation: CaseDefinition.stream (13 authored steps), node-chain layers/CSS/nexusFlow.ts retired, NexusTerminal HUD (left column, per-speaker colors, line stagger, clickable MANIFEST anchors), camera converged (calm width-top / gentle fly to newest card / no move on thought steps), two-column waterfall cardAnchors, NEXUS_BOARD 2300x2700. ./init.sh green (tsc -b zero errors + vite build ~1.3s). Behavior verified by Danny in npm run dev (full rail + free-click across all 3 cases) and stream copy approved - reported back as quan-bu-tong-guo (all passed), 2026-06-12; this session's review markers cleared.

features.evidence: 2026-06-21. Presentation-layer capture mode (hide/clean only, 3 files: railStore.ts sticky `capture` flag + DemoControls.tsx null-render+`c` key + EmployeeDetailScene.tsx stripPersonNumber). Enter via ?capture=1 or press `c` (sticky across seeks — fixes that legacy `h`/hidden was reset by every seek). Hides DemoControls rail panel + `Use case` title cards; keyboard drive still works. Red line (ADR-0015/0016): strips `48%` off Lin Qing's Progress scorecard (renders `brief kept moving`/`core path protected`); dashboard project 48%/72% stay (project data). ⚠ review markers are all code comments — never render (verified body.innerText zero ⚠ across spine). ./init.sh green (tsc -b 0 errors + vite build ~1.3s). Behavior verified via running dev server DOM assertions: idx0 onboarding / idx5 Lin Qing believed (no %) / idx12 hero card renders 'WORTH A CLOSER LOOK' + word 'MISMATCH' does NOT render (CSS class only) + no 48 / idx15 grown (no %); contrast with capture OFF shows 48% + rail panel (proves capture-conditional); stickiness across seeks confirmed; spine order confirmed. Screenshots N/A — continuous canvas rAF saturates renderer & times out preview screenshot (known canvas-eval-timeout per issue); used exact rendered DOM text instead; Danny records the real video. Checkers: Claire (spine+presentation) PASS across all 31 steps; Dana (human-feel+red line) PASS — red line holds, evidence digits read as defending not scoring, MISMATCH gate clean. Notes/full evidence: .issues/feat-006/capture-mode.md. HITL remaining (Danny, out of capture scope): 2 copy 🟡s (`WHAT AVERY PUT TOGETHER`, `HR SIGNAL` labels) + final go-to-record is Danny's call.

features.name: Avery landing page scaffold
features.description: P7-06. Single-page site = slug + product video + eval sheet/benchmark + CTA. Likely a new Next.js/Vercel project (this repo is demo-only, ADR-0001). Scaffold with placeholders. Copy (feat-009) + eval-spec (feat-008) now DONE, so the SCAFFOLD can start AFK with placeholders for video (feat-013) + real eval numbers (feat-011/012). Danny next-wave task #2. See .to-issues/P7-06-landing-page-scaffold.md.
features.evidence:
2026-06-21 (worktree brave-blackburn-eac9f7). Standalone Next.js 16 landing scaffold under landing/ per ADR-0001 (own package.json/build, NOT mixed into demo Vite src; Vercel root dir = landing/). All 6 issue-#2 sections present: hero (DECISION-MEMO §2 master slug verbatim + CTA 'Book a 15-min look') / demo-video placeholder (feat-013) / eval advice-contrast (NOT a scoreboard: advice-as-text, Lin Qing mock + adversarial 'kind-read-is-wrong' row per ADR-0016; baselines unnamed 'a general AI', evidence-shown column, no fake N/X/M — replaced w/ honest pre-registration note per DECISION-MEMO §4) / what-Avery-is-isn't (safeFraming-derived + privacy promise) / email capture / final CTA. ACCEPTANCE: build green (next build: compiled + tsc + 3 static pages); render verified via curl (40KB, all key strings); red-line test passes; rendered-HTML scan = 0 internal-term leaks (TeamMaster/Nexus/Dashboard/feat-IDs/ADR/审字/PLACEHOLDER all 0). Real-assets list + founder-decisions in landing/README.md. CHECKER LOOP (begin-loop, maker!=checker): 2 rounds w/ Ray(ceo)/Dana(dana)/Will(will) blind on rendered copy. R1 found: scary baseline numbers read as a feature not rejected (Dana #1), strawman baselines (Ray), techy 'nothing goes to a server' (all 3), redundant privacy 3x, vague 2ndary CTA, 'read' near a person. R1 fixes: rejected-cell visual treatment (muted+dashed-warn+'rejected read' tag+boxed flag), eval note now leads w/ pre-registration safeguards, dropped 'server' claim, trimmed privacy, 2ndary CTA->'See the actual advice', demo 'catch'>'read'. R2 reverify: Dana 'I'd forward this section now' (#1 resolved), Ray 'forward-to-Dana not delete' (strawman gone, privacy more credible w/ less); both name only-remaining-blocker = real eval data (feat-011/012, out of scope, in asset list). R2 also caught internal-term leak in cells -> fixed. SCREENSHOT TOOL BROKEN in env (preview_screenshot timed out 3x w/ clean console); visual verified by description-to-persona + CSS review, NOT by image. REMAINING HITL (not agent scope): Danny visual 目测 in npm run dev + 审字 on all external strings (kept OUT of page per DECISION-MEMO §6.5, pending-status documented in README) + on-device/privacy wording founder call + actual Vercel deploy + domain + wire email endpoint + drop real video/eval/adversarial assets (feat-013/011/012). ADDENDUM 2026-06-30 (editorial redesign + zh i18n + live deploy): partner sent a self-authored 14-slide pitch deck (D:/Screenshot/template.html, 'Emerald Editorial' PPT). Per Danny's calls — keep the locked 'senior at your ear' voice (ADR-0015), fold ALL deck content into the existing 5-section spine, leave eval empty, defer the deck-vs-product soul conflict (noted, not resolved). Done: (1) extracted the deck design system into landing/app/globals.css (cream/navy/gold, Bodoni Moda + Manrope via next/font, double-rule ornaments, responsive) + ported the gradient Avery logo into Hero; (2) 11 new section components (Audience/WhyItMatters/WrongCut/MorningBriefing/MarketGap/Method/Modules/Stack/Landscape/Revenue/TrustLayer) covering all 14 slides, competitor names de-identified + people-signals kept signal-not-score (red line); (3) Chinese i18n — all copy externalized to app/i18n/en.ts (type Dict = typeof en), zh.ts auto-generated by MiniMax-M3 via scripts/i18n-zh.mjs (reads eval-harness/.env MINIMAX_API_KEY, 18/18 sections, language-invariant fields forced from en), locale via ?lang=zh with EN default (overseas-first); (4) fixed a contrast bug (.section--ink h4 washing out light-card titles). ACCEPTANCE: next build green; EN(/) + ZH(/?lang=zh) verified rendering via dev server. Commit 08d0006 -> origin/main. DEPLOY: landing now has its OWN git-connected Vercel project (Root Directory=landing/), separate from tm2 (tm2 = root Vite demo, retained for video capture/further dev); Danny created+deployed via dashboard import and visually confirmed OK. REMAINING HITL: all EN copy + M3 zh are 审字 DRAFTS, regenerable via scripts/i18n-zh.mjs after EN edits; eval transcript rows still English placeholder (real data via feat-011/012); demo video placeholder (feat-013); Hero zh title slightly awkward ({em} word-order) for Danny to refine; Deployment Protection / public partner URL is Danny's dashboard setting (team has SAML; turn protection OFF on the landing project so the partner can view).

ADDENDUM 2026-07-01 (partner knowledge-pack integration). Folded the partner pack into landing: 5 escalation guardrails + minimum-evidence policy into Method/TrustLayer; new OutputShape.tsx (the canonical 8-field auditable output shape, labels identical to the demo card) + Playbooks.tsx (6 SCN scenarios); review-triad (Dana/Ray/Claire) fixes: de-identified + hard-framed the red-line villain cell in evalRows.ts/EvalContrast.tsx, scrubbed schema words off-screen, trimmed read-not-verdict/confidence redundancy, de-fabricated the MorningBriefing stats. en.ts is the only dict edited; zh.ts regenerated by MiniMax-M3 (i18n-zh.mjs, now with per-section retry) 20/20. tsc --noEmit green (next build needs Vercel for Google Fonts, blocked on local CN network). Eval section kept HONEST/RESERVED (no win-rate wired, the real result is not publishable). All new copy pending Danny review; NOT committed/pushed (deploy risk + IP). Detail in .handoff/partner-integration-0701.md.

ADDENDUM 2026-07-01 (positioning correction, eval-driven). The office-AI capture proved 'we don't label, they do' is not a supported differentiator (2026 free assistants mostly don't label people either). Landing re-anchored: the red line is DEMOTED from competitive-advantage/villain to a TRUST GUARANTEE (kept in TrustLayer/Method/Output/Modules/privacy; whatItIs headline now leads with what Avery IS, person-not-scored becomes a trailing trust note). EvalContrast re-built on the real, evidence-backed diff using de-identified real captures: a general assistant gives good, warm advice but STOPS (no escalation / no stated confidence / no evidence trail) vs Avery which supplies all three (evalRows.ts + EvalContrast.tsx + evalSection copy). Top positioning (marketGap/output/method/stack) already on the right axis, unchanged; demo unchanged. en.ts only; M3 regenerated zh.ts 20/20 (added per-section retry to i18n-zh.mjs); tsc --noEmit green. Still NOT committed/pushed; all copy 待 Danny 审字.

features.name: Avery eval-harness BUILD (headless consultant agent)
features.description: Danny next-wave task #3. BUILD the headless agent designed in feat-007: ~150-line Python think->tool-call->observe loop, claude-opus-4-8 brain, 4 file-based tools (read_case/recall/cite/draft_advice), markdown memory (facts.md+notes.md, keyword recall, defer vector DB), code-enforced red-line validator (the moat), cite() mandatory before advice. Plus the batch scenario runner + cross-family LLM judge pipeline (never Claude-as-judge) + kappa. NOT a product feature (no UI, no repo src) -> separate dir/repo. AFK-runnable as skeleton + mock-scenario run; real runs wait on feat-012 + partner materials. Open stack questions in consultant-agent-open-questions.md need Danny's pick first.
features.evidence:
2026-06-21. Built in eval-harness/ (own dir, product src untouched - verified `git status` clean outside eval-harness). All 3 sub-tickets (GH #3 011a / #4 011b / #5 011c) green on mock; 110 pytest pass. 011a: ~150-line think->tool-call->observe loop (avery/loop.py), pluggable brain (RealBrain=claude-opus-4-8 via anthropic-sdk + MockBrain for offline/AFK), 4 file tools (read_case/recall keyword-over-facts.md+notes.md/cite/draft_advice), markdown memory, 3 tiered skill files (relational model + red line + ADR-0016 kind-read-can-be-wrong). Two HARD GATES in code: cite() un-skippable (draft_advice refuses with zero resolved cites - tool-side) + red-line validator (avery/redline.py = the moat). Red-line ADVERSARIALLY verified across 3 rounds by an independent checker (maker!=checker): person-scoring HARD-FAILS, decisive/exit advice PASSES (ADR-0016 orthogonality holds via person-anchoring - work/team/artifact metrics pass, person-rank-in-group fails); residual ~40% novel-phrasing escape is the DELIBERATE deterministic-gate limit, backstopped by the 011c LLM judge (documented honestly in redline_rules.md, not hidden). 011b: runner.py over frozen+git-hashed manifest (avery/freeze.py, FROZEN.lock.json + drift detection), Avery vs BOTH baselines (raw + scaffolded-minus-redline), order-randomized + swap pairs for position bias, JSON per (scenario,agent). Load-bearing demo proven: scaffolded baseline CITES but still trips red line => the red line, not the scaffold, is the differentiator. 011c: judge.py cross-family judges with a HARD never-Claude guard (assert_non_claude refuses anthropic/claude/opus/sonnet/haiku/fable), hard gates (red-line/grounded/no-halluc) -> 1-5 soft dims (grounding/actionability/humanity/calibration), Cohen's kappa (hand-rolled, no sklearn) vs a 30% human-sample format (synthetic placeholder in mock, flagged; kappa honestly reported as UNDEFINED on the uncontested mock set rather than a misleading 1.0), one-page scorecard.{json,md}. Claims discipline enforced: scorecard claims grounding/actionability/humanity/red-line ONLY, NEVER outcome/ROI (tested). 3 mock scenarios incl. the ADR-0016 'kind read is wrong' (Marcus, decisive-exit) + a null 'do-not-intervene' (Priya). Run: `cd eval-harness && python -m pytest tests/ -q` (110 pass); `python run_one.py cases/lin-qing-checkin.md` (011a e2e); `python runner.py` + `python judge.py runs/<hash>`. OPEN before any PUBLISH (documented in scorecard caveats + run_meta): non_danny_scenarios=0 (need >=3 partner-authored per Ray), human labels synthetic (need real 30% sample), real LLM brains/judges not wired offline (mock is the AFK path; RealBrain wired for Avery, baseline+judge real providers raise a clear pointer). Phil eval-credibility review + judge-guard adversarial check passed. REAL-RUN VALIDATED (2026-06-21): ran live on MiniMax-M3 (Avery+baselines, OpenAI-compatible, reasoning-model <think>-strip) + DeepSeek-Pro & MiniMax cross-family judges. Pipeline works end-to-end; both judges independently cleared the deterministic red-line false-positive (cross-family backstop validated); self-preference flag fires on MiniMax. STRATEGIC FINDING (saved to auto-memory feat012-partner-scenarios-pending): a capable model (M3) run RAW does NOT reflexively score/label people even when baited (cases/jordan-brilliant-but-corrosive.md) -> the anti-scoring moat barely fires on M3-class models; Avery's edge must relocate to citation-discipline/calibration/structure. Two LLM judges both gave all-5 soft scores on easy cases => bottleneck is CASE DIFFICULTY not the judge; need partner-authored harder cases (feat-012, gated on next partner meeting). NOTE: full 4-scenario real batch times out in one 10-min window (reasoning model x multi-step Avery) -> run per-scenario or raise timeout. .env (MiniMax+DeepSeek keys) gitignored; copy to main checkout after merge.

ADDENDUM 2026-07-01 (partner cases + REAL run). Partner delivered a knowledge pack (assets/0630-partner-docs/); folded 6 partner-authored scenario playbooks into cases/scn-00X-*.md (authored_by:'partner'), re-froze the manifest, and upgraded judge.py rubric to 4 new differentiation axes (evidence-citation / escalation-on-risk / calibration / refuse-when-thin) with a new avery/cases.py escalation_risk flag. tests/ now 124 green. Ran the REAL pipeline (runs/real-0701b: MiniMax-M3 brain + DeepSeek/MiniMax cross-family judges, 30 transcripts). HONEST result (full writeup eval-harness/EVAL-REAL-0701.md): red-line adherence is the one clean differentiator (avery 1.0 vs baselines 0.9; LLM judges confirm codex/SCN-002 + scaffold/SCN-004 are real person-tier fails); soft dims all ~5.0 (no discrimination); citation discipline did NOT materialize in real mode (no-halluc avery 0.0, real M3-avery emits uncited numbers = real product gap); still NOT PUBLISHABLE (synthetic human labels). office-AI HITL paste bundle staged at eval-harness/office-ai-capture/PROMPT.md.

ADDENDUM 2026-07-01 (naming honesty + re-run). Danny caught that the real-run agent names (avery-opus/codex-raw/claude-scaffold-minus-redline) carried misleading vendor labels: .env has only MiniMax+DeepSeek keys, so runner.make_brain runs EVERY role on the SAME MiniMax-M3 (OpenAICompatBrain; the Opus RealBrain path raises without ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). It is a same-model ABLATION (scaffold: full-Avery / raw / no-red-line), NOT a cross-vendor bakeoff — run_meta.brain_model already recorded MiniMax-M3. Renamed to avery-m3 / m3-raw / m3-scaffold-no-redline (manifest + 3 test files, pytest 124 green), made stale doc strings honest (runner --real help, judge self-preference message, brain mock name), re-froze (hash bb59a7db), and re-ran real (runs/real-0701c). Result unchanged in substance: red-line adherence is the one clean differentiator and it tracks the RED-LINE VALIDATOR specifically (avery-m3 1.0 / m3-raw 0.9 / m3-scaffold-no-redline 0.8 — removing the validator trips MORE); soft dims ~5.0 undiscriminated; citation weak for all incl. avery (product gap: enforce cite-before-number); NOT PUBLISHABLE (synthetic human labels). Full writeup eval-harness/EVAL-REAL-0701.md has the same-model-ablation disclaimer up top. Danny also ran a live cross-check: SCN-001 pasted into 3 free general assistants -> ms-copilot PASS, chatgpt PASS, gemini FAIL[PERSON-DIAGNOSIS]; 2/3 did not label the person, confirming the 'we-dont-label' edge is weak and the real edge is escalation/calibration/evidence.

features.name: Frozen eval scenario set incl. adversarial 'kind read is wrong'
features.description: Addresses the #1 buyer blocker (DECISION-MEMO sec.3, named identically by Dana AND Ray): every asset only shows Avery protecting the person -> reads as a tool that rationalizes avoiding the hard call. Author/curate 25-30 scenarios frozen+git-hashed before any run, incl. >=3 Danny did NOT author and >=1 where the kind read is the WRONG read (genuine underperformance) and Avery must give humane BUT decisive advice incl. the exit. Render that adversarial case as an eval-sheet row + a demo beat. GATED on Danny's values decision (will Avery back a manager INTO a hard call? recommend YES). Feeds feat-008 sheet, feat-011 runner, feat-013 video.
features.evidence:
2026-06-21 (worktree condescending-feistel-185687). Built from HANDOFF.md. Delivered under docs/strategy/coldstart-deliverables/eval-scenarios/: 27 scenarios as one md each in cases/ (8 founder-authored / 16 agent-composited-public / 3 partner-reserved => non-authored=19, runnable=24); freeze.mjs (node builtins, idempotent — verified byte-identical on re-run) generates scenarios.json + frozen.lock.json with per-scenario evidenceHash and setDigest sha256:d4dbf063...; byKind = 4 adversarial / 5 null / 18 situational; all 10 expectedShapes used. Issue #6 AC all met: >=25 frozen+hashed (27), >=3 non-authored (19), >=1 kind-read-wrong (SCN-002/009/010 + reserved SCN-025). Adversarial case SCN-002 rendered as adversarial-row.md (eval-sheet-spec §4 grammar: THE READ->THE MOVE->GUARDRAIL quoted; baselines anonymized + red-line flagged; decisive incl. exit, zero person-score) + demo-beat.md. README.md carries honest 3-way provenance, anonymization (no Lin Qing/Sun Xiaomei/etc.), 'nothing leaves the machine' local/headless data-handling note, and the freeze/git-hash anti-cherry-pick protocol. No src/ changes (docs only) so init.sh N/A per HANDOFF §8. §9 blind checks BOTH PASS: Ray (ceo) 'spine, not a shield'; Dana (dana) 'red line holds even in the exit case.' Buyer-facing copy in adversarial-row.md/demo-beat.md flagged WARN-Danny-shenzi (not self-finalized, per AGENTS DoD). Commits 24d13e7..bbd18b7. NOTE (out of feat-012 scope, both checkers raised it): real unedited baseline outputs + live demo on a buyer-brought case come via feat-011 runner / feat-013 video; partner-reserved slots fill via feat-011 ingestion.

ADDENDUM 2026-07-01. The partner meeting delivered the >=3 partner-authored (non_danny) real scenarios that feat-012 / EVAL-RESULTS sec.4 named as the #1 publish blocker: 6 SCN playbooks are now frozen cases with authored_by:'partner'. The scorecard publish gate non_danny (=6) and N>=10 gates are CLEARED; only the synthetic-human-label reason keeps it NOT PUBLISHABLE (a real human sample is still required). The adversarial kind-read-is-wrong spine is covered by marcus-genuine-underperformance plus the partner SCN cases.
